status.description: active by default; superseded/rejected/resolved are terminal. Abstention is a TAG (needs-input/unknown), not a status.

depends_on.description: Claim ids this claim relies on; bean-check flags it stale (E_STALE_DEPENDENT) if any becomes superseded/inactive.

tags.description: Convention: load-bearing | needs-input | unknown | confirmed-non-issue | residual | accepted

verified_by.description: 2.0: points this load-bearing claim at a registered oracle (run.json oracles). bean-check reads the recorded verdict in .bean/verdicts/<id>.<verifier>.json; in strict mode the claim converges only if that verdict is declared, fresh (claim_binding matches), and pass.
